_comment: Schema example only. The real bank lives at secrets/master-bank.json (gitignored). Persona keys: internal-enablement (variant1), customer-education (variant2).

meta.purpose: Strictly-from-bank ATS swap recommender source: every added bullet/skill comes verbatim from here.
hard_constraints: Never compose a bullet across companies.
meta.tagging_schema: Free-form JD keywords (tools, methodologies, motions, platforms).

add_bullets.text: Verbatim achievement bullet the recommender may add, owned by exactly one role.

internal-enablement.locator: substring identifying the lowest-priority current bullet
internal-enablement.rationale: Why it is first to go.

internal-enablement.locator: substring identifying a bullet that must never be removed
